sections.title: Market Pulse: Holiday Closure and Economic Data Focus

items.headline: U.S. Markets Closed for Good Friday; Key Economic Data Released
items.summary: U.S. equity markets are closed today, April 3, 2026, in observance of Good Friday. Investors are focused on significant economic data releases, including the March Employment Situation and ISM Services PMI, which are expected to provide crucial insights into the health of the U.S. economy and labor market conditions. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East continue to influence global market sentiment, particularly crude oil prices.

items.headline: Visionary Holdings Inc. leads gainers
items.summary: Visionary Holdings Inc. surged more than 116% as of April 2, 2026.

items.headline: Sky Quarry Inc. sees significant jump
items.summary: Sky Quarry Inc. experienced a notable increase of over 101% on April 2, 2026.

items.headline: Lipocine Inc. plummets on trial failure
items.summary: Lipocine Inc. shares dropped sharply following news of a Phase 3 trial failure for its oral brexanolone, which did not meet its primary endpoint for postpartum depression.

items.headline: PMGC Holdings Inc. reverses earlier gains
items.summary: PMGC Holdings Inc. saw a significant decline, likely due to profit-taking or dilution pressure after recent heavy gains.

items.headline: March Jobs Report and ISM Services PMI Released Today
items.summary: Today, April 3, 2026, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics is releasing the March Employment Situation report, including Nonfarm Payrolls (forecast: 65K, previous: -92K), Unemployment Rate (forecast: 4.4%, previous: 4.4%), and Average Hourly Earnings (forecast: 0.3%, previous: 0.4%). Additionally, the ISM Services PMI for March is also scheduled for release at 10:00 a.m. ET.

items.headline: Federal Reserve's Stance on Interest Rates
items.summary: Following its March meeting, the Federal Reserve held its federal funds rate steady in the 3.5% to 3.75% range. While some FOMC members forecast additional rate cuts this year, one member even projected a rate hike in 2027, highlighting a nuanced outlook for monetary policy amidst soaring input prices.

items.headline: Key Companies Reporting Earnings Today
items.summary: Several companies are scheduled to release earnings today, April 3, 2026. Confirmed reports before market include Acuity Inc ($AYI), AngioDynamics Inc ($ANGO), Pharvaris N.V. ($PHVS), Cheche Group ($CCG), and Namib Minerals ($NAMM). After-market reports include Westport Fuel Systems Inc ($WPRT), GENFIT SA (GNFT.FR), Venus Concept Inc ($VERO), Sabio Holdings (CA:SBIO), BiomX Inc ($PHGE), Trilogy Metals Inc ($TMQ), and Adaptimmune Therapeutics plc ($ADAPY).

items.headline: Geopolitical Tensions Drive Oil Prices, Impacting Market Sentiment
items.summary: Global crude oil prices continue to surge amid ongoing worries of a prolonged conflict in Iran, which has been a dominant factor in economic headlines for the past month. This escalation has fueled inflation concerns and contributed to market volatility, with U.S. oil futures recently recording their biggest gain in six years.
